documentation.description:
=== Output Builder Stream ==
The `Output_Builder_Stream` is a concrete in-memory output stream.
It collects the output in a `Wiki.Strings.Bstring` object and the
content can be retrieved at the end by using the `To_String`
or `Iterate` operation.

tagged_types.name: Output_Builder_Stream
tagged_types.code: type Output_Builder_Stream is limited new Output_Stream with private;

access_types.name: Output_Builder_Stream_Access
access_types.code: type Output_Builder_Stream_Access is access all Output_Builder_Stream'Class;

subprograms.name: Iterate
subprograms.code:
procedure Iterate (Source  : in Output_Builder_Stream;
                   Process : not null access procedure (Chunk : in Wiki.Strings.WString))

subprograms.name: To_String
subprograms.code: function To_String (Source : in Output_Builder_Stream) return String

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code:
procedure Write (Stream  : in out Output_Builder_Stream;
                 Content : in Wiki.Strings.WChar)

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code:
procedure Write (Stream  : in out Output_Builder_Stream;
                 Content : in Wiki.Strings.WString)

subprograms.name: Write_String
subprograms.code:
procedure Write_String (Stream  : in out Output_Builder_Stream;
                        Content : in String)
